clips.title: The Resolve
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, dramatic grade. A rain-soaked street at night, blurred neon behind. A tight close-up framing a person's face head-on, rain running down their determined features, jaw set, eyes forward and unflinching. A person in a soaked collared coat. Cool wet light, neon bokeh, 85mm, close-up. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Weary
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, historical war, muted grade. A dim trench or bunker, soft grey light. A tight close-up framing a person's face, streaked with dirt and exhaustion, eyes distant, a slow tired blink. A person in period military uniform. Cool muted light, soft shadow, 85mm, close-up. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Taste
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm culinary grade. A steamy professional kitchen, warm light. A tight close-up framing a person's face as they taste from a spoon, eyes fluttering closed in satisfaction, a small nod. A person in a white chef's jacket. Warm kitchen light, soft steam, 85mm, close-up. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Laugh
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, joyful grade. A sunny outdoor cafe, warm bokeh behind. A tight close-up framing a person's face mid-laugh, genuine and bright, eyes crinkling, head tipping slightly back. A person in a light summer shirt. Warm golden light, soft bokeh, 85mm, close-up. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Message
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, moody grade. A dark room at night. A tight close-up framing a person's face lit from below by the cool glow of a phone screen, eyes scanning, expression shifting to concern. A person in a casual hoodie. Cool screen glow, deep dark, 85mm, close-up. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Realization
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, tense grade. A quiet office, soft daylight. A tight close-up framing a person's face as understanding dawns, eyes widening slightly, lips parting, a held breath. A person in a smart shirt. Soft cool light, clean background, 85mm, close-up. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
